title: Minimalist Ceramic Ribbed Vase
description: A beautifully crafted matte white ceramic vase. The ribbed texture provides a chic, minimalist aesthetic. Perfect for dried pampas grass, eucalyptus, or fresh floral arrangements. Elevate your living room or entryway decor instantly.

title: Boho Woven Wall Hanging
description: Large macrame wall hanging tapestry. Handwoven cotton cord adds texture and warmth to your bedroom or living room. A perfect focal point for a cozy, bohemian-inspired space.

title: Cozy Chunky Knit Blanket
description: Ultra-soft and warm chunky knit throw blanket. Adds incredible texture and a welcoming, cozy feel to any sofa or bed. Made from premium, hypoallergenic chenille yarn.

title: Modern Arched Wall Mirror
description: Elegant arched wall mirror with a thin gold-finish metal frame. Creates an illusion of more space and light, ideal for entryways, bathrooms, or above a dresser.

title: Natural Rattan Table Lamp
description: Bring a touch of nature indoors with this handwoven rattan table lamp. Emits a soft, warm glow perfect for creating a relaxing atmosphere on bedside tables or side tables.

title: Geometric Neutral Area Rug
description: Soft beige area rug with a subtle geometric pattern. Woven for durability and comfort underfoot. Complements minimalist and modern boho interiors flawlessly.
